mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, CAST(p.content AS CHAR) AS content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked, CASE WHEN pf.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isFavorited FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE 1=1
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.status = 1
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
AND p.user_id = #{userId}
AND p.is_hot = 1
ORDER BY
p.like_count DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, CAST(p.content AS CHAR) AS content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked, CASE WHEN pf.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isFavorited FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE p.id = #{postId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM tb_community_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_community_post SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND comment_count > 0
